use_cases.name: Load and run a language model
use_cases.description: User loads a GGUF model file from cache/registry and generates text interactively

use_cases.name: Start OpenAI-compatible inference server
use_cases.description: User starts an HTTP server serving model inference via OpenAI Chat Completion API

use_cases.name: Chat completion via OpenAI-compatible API
use_cases.description: Client sends chat messages to server and receives streamed or complete responses

use_cases.name: Text completion via OpenAI-compatible API
use_cases.description: Client sends prompt to server and receives completion

use_cases.name: Download and cache a model
use_cases.description: User pulls a model from remote registry and caches it locally for inference

use_cases.name: List cached models
use_cases.description: User lists all models stored in the local cache directory

use_cases.name: Remove a cached model
use_cases.description: User deletes a cached model from storage

use_cases.name: Query model information via API
use_cases.description: Client retrieves model metadata and capabilities via REST API

use_cases.name: Unload model via API
use_cases.description: Client unloads/deletes a model from server memory to free resources

use_cases.name: Tokenize text
use_cases.description: User tokenizes text input using the model's tokenizer

use_cases.name: Generate text embeddings
use_cases.description: Client sends text to server and receives dense vector embeddings

use_cases.name: Content moderation (guard)
use_cases.description: User evaluates text/response for safety risks using guardian models

use_cases.name: Sentiment classification
use_cases.description: User classifies text sentiment (positive/negative/neutral) using sentiment models

use_cases.name: Fine-tune sentiment classifier
use_cases.description: User fine-tunes a sentiment classification model on custom labeled data using LoRA

use_cases.name: Train model (local or distributed)
use_cases.description: User trains a model from scratch or continues training across single/multiple GPUs

use_cases.name: Start distributed training worker
use_cases.description: User starts a worker node for distributed training coordinated with a coordinator

use_cases.name: Automated hyperparameter tuning (AutoML)
use_cases.description: User runs automated hyperparameter search to optimize model performance on a task

use_cases.name: Train EAGLE speculative decoding head
use_cases.description: User trains an EAGLE speculative decoding model to accelerate token generation

use_cases.name: Convert MHA weights to multi-head latent attention (MLA)
use_cases.description: User converts standard multi-head attention GGUF weights to MLA form via truncated SVD

use_cases.name: Transcribe audio to text
use_cases.description: User transcribes audio files to text using speech-to-text models (Voxtral/Whisper)

use_cases.name: Check server health
use_cases.description: Client checks if inference server is running and ready to accept requests

use_cases.name: Monitor server metrics
use_cases.description: Admin scrapes Prometheus metrics from server (tokens/sec, request latency, GPU memory)

use_cases.name: Retrieve OpenAPI specification
use_cases.description: Client retrieves API specification for documentation and SDK generation

use_cases.name: Build custom inference graph
use_cases.description: Developer imports zerfoo/ztensor and builds custom computation graphs for inference

use_cases.name: Build and train custom model
use_cases.description: Developer builds custom neural network architecture and trains it end-to-end

use_cases.name: Use GPU acceleration
use_cases.description: Developer/user runs inference on NVIDIA/AMD/Intel GPUs via CUDA/ROCm/OpenCL

use_cases.name: Use speculative decoding
use_cases.description: User/dev accelerates token generation via speculative decoding with draft model

use_cases.name: Use KV cache with different storage dtypes
use_cases.description: User/dev configures KV cache to use FP16/Q4/Q3 to reduce memory footprint

use_cases.name: Quantize model weights to FP8
use_cases.description: User loads a model and quantizes weights to FP8 E4M3FN for faster inference

use_cases.name: Enable grammar-constrained decoding
use_cases.description: User constrains token generation to valid JSON/SQL/code using grammar rules

use_cases.name: Use paged KV cache
use_cases.description: Developer enables paged KV cache for better memory efficiency on long sequences

use_cases.name: Use compressed KV cache
use_cases.description: Developer enables compressed KV cache for token-by-token compression

use_cases.name: Use prefix caching
use_cases.description: Developer enables prefix caching to reuse KV cache blocks across similar prompts

use_cases.name: Serve model with LoRA adapter selection
use_cases.description: User serves a base model with per-request LoRA adapter selection

use_cases.name: Authenticate API requests with bearer token
use_cases.description: Server validates bearer token in Authorization header for API access control

use_cases.name: Rate limit API requests per IP
use_cases.description: Server rate limits requests per client IP to prevent abuse

use_cases.name: Enable TLS/mTLS for API
use_cases.description: Server supports TLS certificates for secure HTTPS communication

use_cases.name: Batch inference requests
use_cases.description: Server batches multiple inference requests together for higher throughput

use_cases.name: Get zerfoo version
use_cases.description: User retrieves the installed zerfoo version

use_cases.name: Fuse QuaRot Hadamard rotations into weights
use_cases.description: Developer loads model with QuaRot weight fusion for zero-runtime-cost quantized rotation

use_cases.name: Use custom sampling strategies
use_cases.description: Developer/user configures custom token sampling (temperature, top-k, top-p, stop sequences)

use_cases.name: Register custom layer operations
use_cases.description: Developer registers custom neural network layer implementations for model loading

use_cases.name: Create computation engine for custom types
use_cases.description: Developer creates CPU/GPU computation engines for custom numeric types

use_cases.name: Build custom loss functions
use_cases.description: Developer creates custom loss functions for training

use_cases.name: Use multiple optimizers (AdamW, SGD, EMA, SWA)
use_cases.description: Developer selects and configures different optimizers for training

use_cases.name: Use different gradient strategies (DDP, FSDP, ZeRO)
use_cases.description: Developer configures distributed training strategy for multi-GPU/multi-node training

use_cases.name: Work with float16 and bfloat16 types
use_cases.description: Developer uses reduced-precision floating point types for memory efficiency

use_cases.name: Work with float8 types
use_cases.description: Developer uses 8-bit floating point types for extreme quantization

use_cases.name: Create tensors and perform operations
use_cases.description: Developer creates multi-dimensional tensors and performs numeric operations

use_cases.name: Use RMSNorm normalization layer
use_cases.description: Developer uses RMSNorm in custom architectures for stable training

use_cases.name: Use LoRA for parameter-efficient fine-tuning
use_cases.description: Developer fine-tunes large models with minimal parameters using Low-Rank Adaptation

use_cases.name: Stream token generation responses
use_cases.description: Client receives token-by-token generation via server-sent events (SSE)
